title: Exact Rational Multivariable Calculus Checks

solver_reuse.target: exact bivariate gradient QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact polynomial replay computes the y-gradient component at (1,2) as 14, while the malformed row claims the same component is 13.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional multivariable-calculus rows only when they add distinct exact-gradient, Jacobian, Hessian, or finite-matrix solver pressure; keep differentiability from limits, inverse/implicit function theorems, and manifold calculus in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed multivariable polynomial derivative rows as deterministic exact rational arithmetic obligations.
Replay gradients, directional derivatives, Jacobians, chain-rule matrices, and Hessian minors through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the bad-gradient row tied to source-linked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence for the exact gradient-component contradiction.
Keep differentiability from limits, inverse/implicit function theorems, manifolds, and general multivariable analysis marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
